AI Tools Directory

Curated tools and platforms for GEO, AEO, and AIO implementation.

The GEO/AEO/AIO Tool Ecosystem

Optimizing for the AI era requires a sophisticated toolset spanning data architecture, content optimization, AI integration, and governance. Below is our curated directory of tools we work with and recommend — categorized by capability.

Knowledge Graphs & Databases

ArcadeDB

High-performance multi-model graph database supporting SQL, openCypher, and Gremlin. Our preferred database for enterprise knowledge graphs due to its vector search capabilities and ACID compliance.

Graph Database Free / Enterprise

Neo4j

The most established graph database ecosystem. Excellent community support, rich visualization tools (Neo4j Bloom), and mature query language (Cypher).

Graph Database Free / Enterprise

Amazon Neptune

Fully managed graph database service from AWS. Supports both property graph (Gremlin/openCypher) and RDF (SPARQL) models.

Managed Graph DB AWS

Ontotext GraphDB

Semantic graph database with strong RDF and SPARQL support. Excellent for organizations with existing linked data initiatives.

Semantic Graph DB Free / Enterprise

Structured Data & Schema.org Tools

Google Rich Results Test

Test and validate your Schema.org markup for Google's rich results. Essential for verifying structured data implementation.

Validation Free

Schema.org Full Hierarchy

The complete Schema.org vocabulary reference. Bookmark this for all structured data implementation work.

Reference Free

JSON-LD Playground

Test and debug JSON-LD markup. Essential for developing and validating structured data snippets.

Development Free

Merchant Center (Google)

For e-commerce structured data validation and product listing management across Google surfaces including AI overviews.

E-commerce Free

AI Search & Citation Monitoring

ChatGPT (OpenAI)

Primary generative engine to monitor for brand citations. Test how your content appears in ChatGPT responses.

AI Search Free / Plus

Perplexity

Research-focused AI search engine with explicit citations. Critical for citation analysis and brand mention tracking.

AI Search Free / Pro

Google Gemini

Google's multimodal AI model. Increasingly integrated into Google Search through SGE/AIO experiences.

AI Search Free / Advanced

Claude (Anthropic)

Anthropic's AI assistant with strong reasoning capabilities. Important for monitoring how technical and analytical content is cited.

AI Assistant Free / Pro

AI & Data Architecture Platforms

Salesforce Data Cloud

Enterprise CDP with AI-powered data unification, segmentation, and activation. Deep integration with Salesforce ecosystem.

CDP Enterprise

Google BigQuery

Serverless data warehouse with built-in ML capabilities. Our recommended foundation for composable CDP architectures.

Data Warehouse Pay-as-you-go

Hightouch

Reverse ETL platform that syncs warehouse data to operational tools. Essential for composable CDP architectures.

Reverse ETL Free / Enterprise

Vertex AI (Google Cloud)

End-to-end ML platform for building, deploying, and managing AI models. Used for predictive analytics, NLP, and custom AI solutions.

AI Platform Pay-as-you-go

Content & SEO Platforms

Pagefind

Static search library that runs entirely client-side. No server infrastructure required. Ideal for documentation and content-heavy sites.

Search Free

Contentful / Strapi

Headless CMS platforms that enable API-first content delivery — essential for AEO readiness and omnichannel content distribution.

CMS Free / Enterprise

Ahrefs / Semrush

SEO platforms expanding into GEO capabilities. Use for keyword research, competitor analysis, and content gap identification.

SEO/GEO Paid

Akamai / Cloudflare

CDN and edge computing platforms. Critical for page speed optimization, global content delivery, and API acceleration.

CDN / Edge Pay-as-you-go

AI Agents & Automation

Salesforce Agentforce

AI agent platform for building autonomous customer service and commerce agents. Used in our Cubby 2.0 recommendation for Ascott.

AI Agents Enterprise

LangChain

Framework for developing LLM-powered applications. Essential for building custom AI agents and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems.

AI Framework Free

Pinecone / Weaviate

Vector databases for semantic search and LLM memory. Critical for RAG architectures and AI-powered content retrieval.

Vector Database Free / Enterprise

Braze / Iterable

Cross-channel customer engagement platforms with AI-powered orchestration, personalization, and lifecycle automation.

Engagement Enterprise

This directory is continuously updated as the GEO/AEO/AIO tool ecosystem evolves. Contact us for personalized tool recommendations based on your specific stack and objectives.

◆ GEONEXUS

GEO · AEO · AIO — Engineering the Future of AI-Discoverable Content

GEONEXUS is a next-generation agency and education platform specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI Engine Optimization (AEO), and Artificial Intelligence Optimization (AIO). We help enterprises architect, optimize, and future-proof their digital presence for the age of AI-driven discovery.
